acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Apply total and deterministic under collisions

**Invariants to re-verify**

- [ ] Collision winners deterministic
description:
**Problem**
Apply must be total and deterministic for notes/labels/deps and bead collisions.

**Files**
- src/core/apply.rs
- src/core/state.rs
design:
Add tests for:
- note append before bead exists
- label/dep ops on missing bead
- bead creation collision deterministic winner
- note collision deterministic winner
title: Tests: apply orphans + collisions deterministic
add in all clippy lints, including pedantic and nursery

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Docs reject opaque bare BeadId as the robust cross-namespace model.
- [ ] Docs state default bd namespace is core.
- [ ] Docs state JSON/mixed/non-core surfaces carry namespace explicitly while default all-core human/model context stays compact.
- [ ] Docs list current enforcement gaps without claiming wisps before retention GC exists.
description:
**Problem**
The namespace docs still contain old opaque-BeadId planning language and the parent bead still implied migration/backcompat. That conflicts with the hard-cutover rule and the desired default-core UX.

**Files**
docs/go-parity/primitives/namespaces.md, docs/go-parity/DECISION_LOG.md, docs/go-parity/FLOOR1_REPLAN.md, docs/go-parity/types/README.md
design: Update the source-of-truth docs to define namespace identity as BeadRef { namespace, id }, default bare ids to the active namespace, default active namespace to core, and keep namespace rendering compact for all-core/default model context. Record which policy fields are enforced now vs deferred.
title: Namespace graph behavior spec and stale doc cleanup
